sys_remote_update_set.description: An automation bridge designed to centralize identity lifecycle management within Okta Workflows while leveraging ServiceNow for request fulfillment. This application automates the creation of SAML and OIDC integrations and manages complex group assignments. By decoupling the request layer from the execution logic, it ensures Okta admins maintain granular control over authentication policies and approval sequences without leaving the Okta ecosystem.
sys_remote_update_set.name: Okta Workflows

sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_db657f898301721027abc7a6feaad30a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Create a new SSO integration to Okta on Okta">aa65fb898301721027abc7a6feaad318</cat_item><cat_variable>IO:d9363b913b50a650d4153434c3e45af6</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Validate Certificate</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {
    if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
        return;
    }

    var ga = new GlideAjax('SSOAppOktaAjax');
    ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'isValidPublicKey');
    ga.addParam('public_key', newValue);
	ga.addParam('app_name',g_form.getValue('application_name'));
    ga.getXMLAnswer(getResponse);

    function getResponse(response) {
        var validCert = response;
		if(response == 'false'){
			g_form.clearValue('signing_cert');
			g_form.showErrorBox('signing_cert','Invalid Certificate');
		}
		else if(response == 'true'){
			g_form.showFieldMsg('signing_cert','Valid Certificate');
		}
    }

}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-11-05 06:30:08</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>db657f898301721027abc7a6feaad30a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Validate Certificate</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Okta Workflows" source="x_1647345_okta_w_0">1d1f06c18305321027abc7a6feaad330</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Okta Workflows">1d1f06c18305321027abc7a6feaad330</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_db657f898301721027abc7a6feaad30a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-11-05 06:30:08</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>true</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>true</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>true</applies_target_record><applies_to>set</applies_to><cat_item/><cat_variable>IO:bfe973458341721027abc7a6feaad30c</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Validate ACS URL</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {
    if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
        return;
    }
    var url = newValue;

    //Iterate through the array to check each URL
    var isValid = true;


    if (!url.startsWith('https://') && !url.startsWith('http://')) {
        isValid = false;
    }

    if (!isValid) {
        g_form.showFieldMsg('acs_sso_endpoint', 'Url must start with "https://" or "http://"', 'error');
    } else {
        g_form.hideAllFieldMsgs('acs_sso_endpoint');
    }

}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-11-05 06:44:57</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>d4d877818341721027abc7a6feaad308</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Validate ACS URL</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Okta Workflows" source="x_1647345_okta_w_0">1d1f06c18305321027abc7a6feaad330</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Okta Workflows">1d1f06c18305321027abc7a6feaad330</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_d4d877818341721027abc7a6feaad308</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-11-05 06:54:11</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set display_value="SAML Variables">5b953bc98301721027abc7a6feaad306</variable_set><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

   if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
      return;
   }
	g_form.clearValue('slo');
